purpose: Describe module responsibilities and dependency boundaries for safer refactors.

modules.responsibility: Render operator UI and interact with API contracts.
Expose HTTP endpoints and orchestrate bot/analytics services.
Execute observer and publisher automation with fail-closed guards.
Transform activity logs into analytics payloads and guidance.
Define and validate runtime and data contracts.

refactor_policy: Prefer extracting by feature slice: route + state + API clients + presentational components.
Preserve fail-closed automation and contract validation during UI refactors.
